anti_claim: The observatory intake bridge is a source-open browser/read-model over runtime command outputs and receipt refs. It omits only unsafe payload bodies and credential-equivalent live access; it does not host, publish, authorize release, call providers, or prove private-root equivalence.

projection_status_protocol.anti_claim: Cell status is intake coordination. It is not an imported macro body, a capability proof, or a reason to avoid importing real non-secret substrate.

public_claim: The local observatory shows the same spine, intake, reveal, and evidence causality that the JSON commands expose.
